items.definition_en: A carrot is a long orange vegetable.
items.example_en: She sliced a carrot for the salad.

items.definition_en: A potato is a round vegetable with brown skin.
items.example_en: He boiled a potato for dinner.

items.definition_en: An onion is a vegetable with layers and a strong taste.
items.example_en: The soup needs one onion.

items.definition_en: A tomato is a red round vegetable.
items.example_en: He added tomato to the sandwich.

items.definition_en: Lettuce is a leafy green vegetable.
items.example_en: She put lettuce in the burger.

items.definition_en: A cucumber is a long green vegetable.
items.example_en: He cut the cucumber into slices.

items.definition_en: Broccoli is a green vegetable with a thick stem.
items.example_en: They cooked broccoli for dinner.

items.definition_en: A pepper is a colorful vegetable with a sweet flavor.
items.example_en: He chopped a red pepper for the salad.

items.definition_en: Spinach is a green leafy vegetable.
items.example_en: She likes spinach in her omelette.

items.definition_en: A bean is a small green or brown vegetable.
items.example_en: We had bean soup for lunch.

items.definition_en: Cabbage is a round green or purple vegetable.
items.example_en: They made a salad with cabbage.

items.definition_en: A pea is a small green round vegetable.
items.example_en: Peas are her favorite vegetable.

items.definition_en: A pumpkin is a large orange vegetable.
items.example_en: We made soup from pumpkin.

items.definition_en: A zucchini is a green vegetable shaped like a cucumber.
items.example_en: He added sliced zucchini to the pasta.

items.definition_en: An eggplant is a purple vegetable with soft flesh.
items.example_en: The pizza had eggplant on top.

items.definition_en: Celery is a green vegetable with long crunchy stalks.
items.example_en: He put celery sticks in his lunch box.

items.definition_en: A cauliflower is a white vegetable similar to broccoli.
items.example_en: She steamed cauliflower for dinner.

items.definition_en: A radish is a small red and white vegetable.
items.example_en: He added a radish to his salad.

items.definition_en: Beetroot is a dark red root vegetable.
items.example_en: Beetroot gives salad a sweet flavor.

items.definition_en: A sweet potato is an orange root vegetable.
items.example_en: She made fries from a sweet potato.
